name: Rick James
description: American singer, songwriter and record producer (1948-2004)
abstract: James Ambrose Johnson Jr. (February 1, 1948 – August 6, 2004), better known by his stage name Rick James, was an American singer, songwriter, and record producer.

about_quotes.speaker: Wycliffe Gordon
about_quotes.evidence: the popular R&B groups were like Rick James or Parliment Funkadellic, Kool and the Gang. So we were into listening to that at the time
about_quotes.doc_title: Wycliffe Gordon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 17, 2001
